result.stdout:
Description:
  CS-FV: C# Formal Verification Tool

Usage:
  cs-fv [command] [options]

Options:
  --version       Show version information
  -?, -h, --help  Show help and usage information

Commands:
  verify <file>  Verify C# file with formal contracts
  check <path>   Check contract syntax without verification
  init           Initialize CS-FV in current project
  version        Show version information

commands.payload:
Description:
  CS-FV: C# Formal Verification Tool

Usage:
  cs-fv [command] [options]

Options:
  --version       Show version information
  -?, -h, --help  Show help and usage information

Commands:
  verify <file>  Verify C# file with formal contracts
  check <path>   Check contract syntax without verification
  init           Initialize CS-FV in current project
  version        Show version information

result.stdout:
Description:
  Check contract syntax without verification

Usage:
  cs-fv check <path> [options]

Arguments:
  <path>  Path to .cs file, directory, .csproj, or .sln file to check

Options:
  --verbose                            Show detailed output including all warnings
  --internal-access <internal-access>  Comma-separated assembly names (or assembly:true/false pairs) for internal visibility grants
  -?, -h, --help                       Show help and usage information

Options:

  -?, -h, --help                       Show help and usage information

result.stdout:
Description:
  Initialize CS-FV in current project

Usage:
  cs-fv init [options]

Options:
  --force         Overwrite existing configuration
  --verbose       Show detailed output
  -?, -h, --help  Show help and usage information

commands.payload:
Description:
  Initialize CS-FV in current project

Usage:
  cs-fv init [options]

Options:
  --force         Overwrite existing configuration
  --verbose       Show detailed output
  -?, -h, --help  Show help and usage information

result.stdout:
Description:
  Verify C# file with formal contracts

Usage:
  cs-fv verify <file> [options]

Arguments:
  <file>  Path to the C# file to verify

Options:
  --method <method>                        Verify only the specified method by name
  --verbose                                Show detailed output (SMT code, CVC5 output)
  --timeout <timeout>                      Solver timeout in seconds (default: 60) [default: 60]
  --solver <solver>                        Solver to use: auto, cvc5, z3, yices2, all, or both (default: auto) [default: auto]
  --cvc5-path <cvc5-path>                  Path to CVC5 executable (default: uses PATH)
  --format <format>                        Output format: human or json (default: human) [default: human]
  --concurrency-bound <concurrency-bound>  Context bound for thread interleaving analysis (k=N context switches, default: auto-detect)
  -?, -h, --help                           Show help and usage information
